name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, invoice discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between vendor invoices and purchase orders
